footer.name: Name: Renzo Steller
footer.connect: Want to get in touch? Click here:

projectIntro.label: About the project
projectIntro.title: Quickly set up a programming project in VS Code
projectIntro.body: Hallo Wereld is a VS Code extension that lets you create a complete programming project in one click — including a virtual environment, recommended extensions and a starter file.

features.label: Features
features.title: What does the extension do?
features.body: With a single command, the extension handles everything you need to start coding right away.

getStarted.label: Get started
getStarted.title: Ready in three steps
getStarted.body: Install the extension and start coding right away.

step2.label: Open the Command Palette
step2.detail: Press Ctrl+Shift+P and search for Hello World {Programming language of your choice}.

step3.label: Ready to code
step3.detail: The extension sets up your project automatically.
